description_long: This is a classical-style fountain sculpture featuring a central pedestal supporting a large basin, with a detailed statue of a human figure holding a smaller figure atop the basin. The sculpture is set within a circular stone basin, which is itself embedded in a square stone platform. The figures appear to be rendered in a realistic style, with flowing drapery and expressive postures, suggesting a mythological or allegorical theme. The stonework of the basin and platform is textured and weathered, indicating outdoor installation. The overall color palette is dominated by shades of gray and off-white, with subtle variations in the stone and sculpted surfaces. The fountain's design is both decorative and functional, serving as a visual centerpiece in a public or park setting.
description: A classical stone fountain sculpture with a central human figure atop a large basin, set within a circular stone pool on a square platform. The piece features detailed, realistic sculpting and a weathered stone finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main human figure and smaller figure clearly, with the full circular basin and square platform visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the side of the main figure and the depth of the basin, with the platform's edge in perspective.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the back of the main figure and the curvature of the basin, with less detail on the figures' faces.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the profile of the figures and the thickness of the basin wall, with the platform's side in full view.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure with child in classical style
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is set in an outdoor environment, likely a public park or plaza, as indicated by the stone platform and weathered appearance.
